x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url https://api.dirextx.ca/order \
  --header 'accept: text/plain' \
  --header 'content-type: application/*+json' \
  --data '{"account": "1111","shipAddressID": 1111,"conAddressID": 1111,"del_inst": "Leave at door","cust_ref": "John Doe","checkedEmail": true,"deliveryEmail": "johndoe@example.com","rate": {"baseRate": 3,"ser_time": 10,"ser_area": "S","dtdct": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z","dtCallIn": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"},"email": "user@example.com","pieces": 0,"weight": 0,"packageType": "Envelope","caller": "string","additionalEmail": "user@example.com","returnTripServic": {"baseRate": 0,"ser_time": 0,"dtdct": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"}}'

import requests

url = "https:/api.directx.ca/orders/12345"

response = requests.request("GET", url)

print(response.text)
